prompt: design a lithium-ion battery pack enclosure

intent.design_goal: Design a lithium-ion battery pack enclosure

constraints.description: Must meet relevant battery containment and fire suppression standards (e.g., UL 2054, IEC 62133).
Maintain battery temperature within safe operating range using passive or active cooling methods.
Withstand shock, vibration, and compression forces typical of the intended application.
Minimize overall mass of the enclosure while meeting structural requirements.
Fit within specified chassis dimensions and allow easy access to cells and connectors.

unknowns: Number and arrangement of lithium-ion cells
Desired cooling method (ambient, forced air, liquid cooling)
intent.raw_input: design a lithium-ion battery pack enclosure

requirement_spec.design_goal: Design a lithium-ion battery pack enclosure

requirements.description: Design object type resolved as battery_pack_enclosure
requirements.originating_text: design a lithium-ion battery pack enclosure
downstream_design_consequences: Initializes constraint graph even when numeric targets are absent

requirement_spec.completeness_rationale: All required engineering decisions resolved from prompt.

functional_analysis.primary_function: Provide a safe, lightweight, and thermally controlled enclosure for a lithium‑ion battery pack that meets relevant safety standards and allows easy access to cells and connectors.

functions.name: Contain and secure battery cells
functions.description: Maintain physical separation of individual battery cells and prevent movement or damage during use.

functions.name: Provide structural integrity against mechanical loads
functions.description: Withstand shock, vibration, and compression forces while maintaining enclosure shape.

functions.name: Ensure compliance with battery safety standards
functions.description: Design for containment and fire suppression in accordance with UL 2054, IEC 62133, and related regulations.

functions.name: Suppress fire and thermal runaway
functions.description: Provide passive (barrier layers) and/or active (intelligent suppression) measures to contain and extinguish a battery fire.

functions.name: Maintain battery temperature within safe limits
functions.description: Use cooling methods to keep the battery within its operating temperature range.

functions.name: Provide thermal conduction path from battery to cooling media
functions.description: Ensure efficient heat transfer from the cells to the cooling system.

functions.name: Implement active cooling and monitoring
functions.description: Provide active cooling channels, sensor interfaces, and control electronics for dynamic temperature management.

functions.name: Allow access to cells and connectors
functions.description: Design openings or panels that enable maintenance, inspection, or cell replacement without compromising containment.

functions.name: Minimize weight
functions.description: Select materials and structural configurations that reduce mass while satisfying all higher‑level safety, mechanical, and thermal functions.

flows.description: Heat generated by battery cells transferred to enclosure walls.
Heat conducted to active cooling system (e.g., liquid coolant or heat pipes).
Residual heat dissipated to the surrounding environment.
Mechanical loads applied to structure during assembly and operation.
Temperature sensor data sent to cooling control electronics.
Coolant or air removed after thermal exchange.

required_assemblies.name: Battery Containment Chamber
required_assemblies.purpose: Encapsulate the battery pack while preventing cell movement.

required_assemblies.name: Structural Shell
required_assemblies.purpose: Deliver stability against tolerable shock, vibration, and compression, and support safety features.

required_assemblies.name: Fire Suppression Layer
required_assemblies.purpose: Act as a barrier or active suppression medium when a fault occurs.

required_assemblies.name: Cooling System
required_assemblies.purpose: Transfer heat from battery cells to the external environment using conduction, convection, or active fluids.

required_assemblies.name: Access Panel
required_assemblies.function: Allow access to cells and connectors
required_assemblies.purpose: Enable maintenance operations while maintaining containment.

component_names: Stainless Steel 304 Access Hatch Alignment Assembly
